issues.title: Enemy dealt 39 dmg (87% of 45 HP) on floor 6
issues.description: On floor 6, encounter 2, turn 5 (seq 209), the enemy dealt 39 damage which is 87% of the player's 45 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 38 dmg (100% of 38 HP) on floor 6
issues.description: On floor 6, encounter 2, turn 7 (seq 217), the enemy dealt 38 damage which is 100% of the player's 38 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-1)
issues.description: 3 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90% HP (>72). Encounters: F1E0:73HP, F1E1:73HP, F1E2:73HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.

issues.title: 4 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-2)
issues.description: 4 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90% HP (>72). Encounters: F1E0:73HP, F1E1:73HP, F1E2:73HP, F2E0:73HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 2: 6 turns vs prev floor avg 2.0
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 took 6 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 2.0 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: the_archivist (boss).

issues.title: Floor 6 enc 2: 7 turns vs prev floor avg 2.7
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 6 took 7 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 2.7 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: knowledge_golem (boss).

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (140 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
